title: Original Swamp
description: Origins themed modpack with optimizations and first person enhancing features
body:
# 🌳🐸 Original Swamp 🐍🌿

Original Swamp is a really cool modpack for Minecraft that combines the Origins mod with some fancy optimization to make the game run smoother and look better.

### 🚀 Is it like Optifine?

Nah, it's not Optifine. Instead, it uses SODIUM and some other mods that make the game crazy fast and smooth, with almost no frame drops.

### 💥 Lots of Awesome New Mods

And that's not all! Original Swamp also has a bunch of totally awesome new mods that add all kinds of cool stuff to the game, like minimaps (with claims and parties), new foods, and revamped structures. So if you're looking for some new adventures in Minecraft, you gotta check it out and see what you can discover!

### 🐮 Origins

In this mod, there are also ORIGINS, which are similar to classes. Each one provides unique perks and debuffs.

### 🪶 Lightweight

With only 60–70 mods, this modpack is light as a feather. It can run on most hardware and even on 1.18.2.
